subject: Adding MUSIC Common charts
commit_message:
Adding MUSIC Common charts

Includes:
Cassandra 3.11 - Current Common cassandra is lacking security.
Tomcat 8.5 - Docker Hub
Zookeeper 3.4 - Chart from Incubator/Zookeeper
 - https://github.com/helm/charts/tree/master/incubator/zookeeper

Fixed Issue with Zookeeper not starting. Was unable to write to
pvc location.

add copyright header to the files where it's missing
remove all the trailing whitespaces
bump charts version to 3.0.0 and also requirement chart to 3.0.0

Adding resource limits

Update Music Chart.yaml to 3.0.0

Make recomended fixes due to resources bug.
Updated port to 76
Update cassandra values.
Add  nodePortPrefixExt

Fix Tomcat  sevice Name.
Update Names
Add Readiness Image
Update Service names
Fix cassandra service
Update tomcat chart
Update job chart to incluede timeout.
Update job chart to include delay for run

Remove some unneded files and
  update tomcat helm readiness
Replace removed files that were braking the jenkins build
Made suggested changes
Update Replication factor from 1 to 3,3 is default, 1 was set for testing.

Move tag:version into image:
Remove commented out values and aafAdminUrl

Change-Id: I47eafae052cbe7355468655e5f8fcda8402bafd6
Issue-ID: MUSIC-99
Signed-off-by: Nelson,Thomas(tn1381)(arthurdent3) <tn1381@att.com>
Signed-off-by: Thomas Nelson Jr arthuerdent3 <nelson24@att.com>

Patch Set 5:

Why not add the job as part of the main cassandra chart itself. Do we need another chart for running a job?

Patch Set 5:

@Kiran Kamineni - Actually reading into what you said, maybe your asking why do I have a cassandra job? Well There is a common/cassandra and when that meets my needs of being secure, I can simply include that instead of using my own cassandra. I used to have them together but split them out to prepare for a time when a common cassandra existed.

Patch Set 17: Code-Review-1

The cassandra-job seems to be running /runcql.sh which times out in our cluster when we are trying to bring up music. 
The default cqlsh timeout is 10. Maybe we should look at using a larger timeout in the runcql.sh script so the script does not timeout in between.
Any errors or timeouts that happen in between become unrecoverable a the admin password gets changed in the second step. This means that we have to bring up the entire music and sub charts again.

Patch Set 35: Code-Review-1

(4 comments)

Missing copyright header for zookeeper.

Patch Set 35:

Also, it's overkill to create a chart for a job, Job should be part of the application chart, as it's basically and initial step for that chart. To properly sequence app and job, using helm hook is a way.

Patch Set 35:

(2 comments)

Regarding zookeeper. This is from the helm charts incubator/zookeeper. We have made some changes, so how do I apply a copyright?
